title: 4 Business-Software Services Stocks to Watch in a Thriving Industry
text: The Zacks Business-Software Services industry players like MSCI, TYL, GWRE and PLUS are poised to continue benefiting from the increasing demand for multi-cloud-enabled software solutions amid the accelerated digital transformation and a shift to cloud initiatives.

title: MSCI to Participate in Barclays Americas Select Franchise Conference
text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--MSCI Inc. (“MSCI” or the “Company”) (NYSE: MSCI), a leading provider of critical decision support tools and services for the global investment community, announced today that Baer Pettit, President, will participate in a fireside chat on Tuesday, May 9, 2023, at 10:15 AM Eastern Time as a part of the Barclays 15th Annual Americas Select Franchise Conference. A live webcast and replay will be available on the events and presentations section of MSCI's Investor Relation.

title: Why MSCI Stock Fell 13.8% in April
text: MSCI posted solid revenue and earnings gains in Q1, beating analysts' estimates. While price targets were lowered due to near-term headwinds, the stock remains poised for long-term growth.

title: MSCI Appoints Ashley Lester as Global Head of Research
text: LONDON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--MSCI Inc. (NYSE: MSCI), a leading provider of critical decision support tools and services for the global investment community, announced today that Ashley Lester has joined the firm as Global Head of Research and as a member of MSCI's Executive Committee. Based in London, Mr. Lester will report to Baer Pettit, President. In this role, Mr. Lester will be responsible for the development of MSCI's research across the firm's product lines and client segments of asset manag.

title: My Top 15 High-Growth Dividend Stocks For May 2023
text: I present my top 15 high-growth dividend stocks to consider during the month of May. The watchlist posted a gain of 0.41% in April, trailing both VIG and SPY.
